title: Thai Omelette
description: A simple Thai-inspired omelette filled with egg, perfect for a quick breakfast.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork.
Add the Thai chili flakes, salt, and black pepper to the eggs and whisk until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the shredded coconut to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Pour the egg mixture over the coconut and cook until the edges start to set.
Add the chopped Thai basil to one half of the omelette.
Use a spatula to gently fold the other half of the omelette over the basil.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
